text: RT @andst7: Alex Soros alla conferenza dei progressisti a Barcellona, insieme a Elly Schlein, che attacca Elon Musk. Non solo presenza: Sor…

More observations on X algorithm. 

1) one liners and memes don’t get any views even when good 
2) 30 seconds videos with dialog have great performance (when interesting) 
3) put less brand names in your captions, people scroll through, treated as ads 
4) reply with meaningful

The continuing gap between the capabilities of Gemini Pro 3.1 (very good model) and the capabilities of the Gemini app/website is odd. The model can do what Claude/GPT can do, but there is a minimal harness for tools (file creation, research etc), no auditable CoT/actions, manual

An obvious way to release Mythos class models with uncertain autonomous ability is to make them only available on the website, like Gemini Deep Think or ChatGPT Pro.

Minimal risk of being used for autonomous hacking, but accessible to people who have hard problems to solve.

Doctor doesn’t like patients using AI because they come prepared with harder questions and he can’t “coast” anymore 🫠

This is a tough watch.

From a patient perspective - it’s never been harder to get a 15 minute appointment with a doctor. Why not come educated? https://t.co/M7nf8KqmxO
